get.summary:
Lists all accessible crawl configurations.
Admins receive all configs; non-Admin users receive only configs for their assigned clients.

post.summary:
Creates a new crawl configuration.
Admins may create for any client; non-Admin users may only create for their assigned clients.

403.description: Non-Admin caller does not own the specified client.

409.description: Config for this org/project already exists for the client.

patch.summary:
Applies partial updates to a crawl configuration.
Admins may update any config; non-Admin users may only update configs for their clients.

requestBody.description: Fields to update; omit a field to leave it unchanged.

403.description: Non-Admin caller does not own this config's client.

delete.summary:
Deletes a crawl configuration.
Admins may delete any config; non-Admin users may only delete configs for their clients.

403.description: Non-Admin caller does not own this config's client.

get.summary: Returns all users.

post.summary: Creates a new application user.

delete.summary: Disables a user and revokes all their tokens and PATs.

get.summary: Returns a single user with their client role assignments.

post.summary: Assigns a client role to a user.

delete.summary: Removes a client role assignment from a user.

get.summary:
Lists projects available within one configured Azure DevOps organization scope.
Requires global admin or `ClientUser` access for the specified client.

403.description: Caller lacks required client access.

404.description: The organization scope was not found.

get.summary:
Lists repositories or wikis available within one configured Azure DevOps project.
Requires global admin or `ClientUser` access for the specified client.

403.description: Caller lacks required client access.

404.description: The organization scope was not found.

get.summary:
Lists branches available for one discovered repository or wiki source.
Requires global admin or `ClientUser` access for the specified client.

403.description: Caller lacks required client access.

404.description: The organization scope was not found.

get.summary:
Lists repository options and branch suggestions suitable for crawl-filter configuration.
Requires global admin or `ClientUser` access for the specified client.

403.description: Caller lacks required client access.

404.description: The organization scope was not found.

post.summary: Authenticate with username and password; returns a JWT access token and refresh token.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new JWT access token.

get.summary: Returns the current user's global role and per-client roles. Requires authentication.
Lists all AI connections for the specified client.

200.description: List of AI connections (API keys are never returned).

403.description: Caller does not own this client.

post.summary: Creates a new AI connection for the specified client.

403.description: Caller does not own this client.

patch.summary: Updates non-null fields of an AI connection.

requestBody.description: Fields to update; omit a field to leave it unchanged.

403.description: Caller does not own this client.
Caller does not own this client.

post.summary: Activates the specified AI connection with the given model deployment.

requestBody.description: Activation request containing the model to use.

400.description: Model not in the connection's model list.

403.description: Caller does not own this client.

post.summary: Deactivates the specified AI connection.

403.description: Caller does not own this client.

post.summary:
Probes the given endpoint URL with the supplied API key and returns the list of available
model deployment names. Returns an empty list when the endpoint is unreachable or returns
no deployments — the caller should surface this as a warning, not an error.

requestBody.description: Endpoint URL and API key to probe.

200.description: List of model deployment names (may be empty).

403.description: Caller does not own this client.

post.summary: Registers a new client. Requires a global admin JWT or `X-User-Pat`.

403.description: Caller is not a global admin.

get.summary:
Lists registered clients.
Admins receive all clients.
Non-admin users receive only clients for their assigned roles.
Requires a valid JWT bearer token or `X-User-Pat`.

delete.summary:
Removes ADO service principal credentials from a client.
Requires a global admin JWT or `X-User-Pat`.

204.description: Credentials removed (or client had no credentials — idempotent).

put.summary:
Sets or replaces ADO service principal credentials for a client.
Requires a global admin JWT or `X-User-Pat`.

requestBody.description: ADO credential details — all three fields required.

400.description: One or more fields are missing or blank.

delete.summary:
Deletes a client and all its crawl configurations.
Requires a global admin JWT or `X-User-Pat`.

get.summary:
Gets a single client by ID.
Requires valid user authentication and access to the requested client.

403.description: Forbidden

patch.summary:
Updates one or more fields of a client (display name, active status, custom system message).
Requires a global admin JWT or `X-User-Pat`.

requestBody.description: Fields to update; omit a field to leave it unchanged.

put.summary:
Sets or replaces the ADO reviewer identity GUID for a client.
Requires global admin or `ClientAdministrator` role for the specified client.
Until this is set, review jobs for the client will be rejected.

requestBody.description: The ADO identity GUID of the AI service account.

403.description: Caller lacks required role for this client.

get.summary:
Lists Azure DevOps organization scopes configured for a client.
Requires global admin or `ClientUser` access for the specified client.

403.description: Caller lacks required client access.

post.summary:
Creates an Azure DevOps organization scope for a client.
Requires global admin or `ClientAdministrator` access for the specified client.

403.description: Caller lacks required client access.

409.description: An organization scope for the URL already exists.

get.summary:
Gets one Azure DevOps organization scope configured for a client.
Requires global admin or `ClientUser` access for the specified client.

403.description: Caller lacks required client access.

404.description: Client or organization scope not found.

patch.summary:
Applies partial updates to an Azure DevOps organization scope.
Requires global admin or `ClientAdministrator` access for the specified client.

requestBody.description: Fields to update; omit a field to leave it unchanged.

403.description: Caller lacks required client access.

404.description: Client or organization scope not found.

409.description: An organization scope for the URL already exists.

delete.summary:
Deletes an Azure DevOps organization scope from a client.
Requires global admin or `ClientAdministrator` access for the specified client.

403.description: Caller lacks required client access.

404.description: Client or organization scope not found.

get.summary: Returns daily token consumption samples for the specified client within the given date range.

200.description: Token usage data grouped by (model, day).

400.description: Date parameters are missing or invalid.

403.description: Caller does not have access to this client.

get.summary:
Resolves ADO identities matching the given display name within an organisation.
Returns the VSS identity GUID required for the client's `reviewerId` setting.
Works for users, service principals, and managed identities.
Requires either a global admin or a user with `ClientAdministrator` access for at least one client,
authenticated via JWT bearer token or `X-User-Pat`.

parameters.name: displayName
parameters.description: Display name of the identity to search for.

403.description: Caller is authenticated but lacks `ClientAdministrator` access.

404.description: No identity found with that display name.

get.summary:
Returns all review jobs across all clients, newest first.
Requires an Admin JWT or `X-User-Pat` for unrestricted access, or valid user authentication for scoped client access.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1–1000, default 100).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (default 0).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional status filter: Pending, Processing, Completed, or Failed.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: Optional client filter: only return jobs for this client.

parameters.name: pullRequestId
parameters.description: Optional pull request filter: only return jobs for this pull request.

get.summary: Returns detail for a single review job including per-tier token breakdown.
Returns the review result (summary and comments) for a completed job.

404.description: Job not found or result not yet available.

get.summary: Returns the protocol (agentic trace) for a single review job.

Returns an aggregated view of all review jobs, token breakdowns, and memory records for a specific pull request.
Requires valid user authentication and access to the specified client.

200.description: PR view returned (empty DTO with zero jobs when the PR has no review jobs).

get.summary: Returns the ProCursor knowledge sources configured for the given client.

200.description: Configured ProCursor sources for the client.

403.description: Caller does not have access to the client.

post.summary: Creates a new ProCursor repository or git-backed wiki source for the given client.

403.description: Caller does not have administrator access to the client.

post.summary: Queues a durable ProCursor index job for the selected tracked branch or the source default branch.

403.description: Caller does not have administrator access to the client.

409.description: Embedding configuration is incomplete or incompatible for the client.

get.summary: Returns the tracked branches configured for the given ProCursor source.

403.description: Caller does not have access to the client.

post.summary: Adds a tracked branch to an existing ProCursor source.

403.description: Caller does not have administrator access to the client.

409.description: A duplicate tracked branch already exists.

put.summary: Updates refresh behavior for one tracked branch.

403.description: Caller does not have administrator access to the client.

404.description: Client, source, or branch not found.

delete.summary: Removes a tracked branch from a ProCursor source.

403.description: Caller does not have administrator access to the client.

404.description: Client, source, or branch not found.

409.description: The last tracked branch cannot be removed.

get.summary: Returns aggregated ProCursor token usage for a client-wide reporting interval.

403.description: Caller does not have administrator access to the client.

get.summary: Returns the highest-consuming ProCursor knowledge sources for a selected client period.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of ranked items to return.

400.description: The period or limit was invalid.

403.description: Caller does not have administrator access to the client.

get.summary: Returns aggregated ProCursor token usage for one knowledge source.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Optional inclusive start date in `yyyy-MM-dd` format.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Optional inclusive end date in `yyyy-MM-dd` format.

403.description: Caller does not have administrator access to the client.

404.description: The requested source was not found for the client.

get.summary: Returns recent safe ProCursor usage events for one knowledge source.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of recent events to return.

403.description: Caller does not have administrator access to the client.

404.description: The requested source was not found for the client.

get.summary: Exports ProCursor token usage rows as CSV for the selected interval.

403.description: Caller does not have administrator access to the client.

get.summary: Returns freshness metadata for ProCursor token usage rollups.

403.description: Caller does not have administrator access to the client.

post.summary: Rebuilds ProCursor token usage rollups for the selected captured interval.

403.description: Caller does not have administrator access to the client.

get.summary: Lists all prompt overrides for the specified client.

403.description: Caller is not a global admin or client administrator for this client.

post.summary: Creates a new prompt override for the specified client.

403.description: Caller is not a global admin or client administrator for this client.

409.description: An override with the same scope and prompt key already exists for this client / crawl config.

put.summary: Replaces the override text of an existing prompt override.

403.description: Caller is not a global admin or client administrator for this client.
Caller is not a global admin or client administrator for this client.

get.summary: Get the status and result of a review job.

parameters.name: X-Ado-Token
parameters.description:
ADO personal access token used solely to verify the requesting user is an authenticated ADO
organisation member.

parameters.name: X-Ado-Org-Url
parameters.description:
ADO organisation URL (e.g. https://dev.azure.com/myorg). Required when using browser-extension
session tokens; omit for PATs.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The job identifier returned from POST /clients/{clientId}/reviews.

200.description: Job status and, once completed, its result.

get.summary: List all review jobs for the specified client.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: ID of the client whose review jobs are listed.

200.description: List of review jobs, newest first.

403.description: Caller lacks the required role for this client.

post.summary: Submit a pull request for AI review.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: ID of the client on whose behalf the review is triggered.

parameters.name: X-Ado-Token
parameters.description: Azure DevOps personal access token for ADO API operations. Must never be logged or persisted.

202.description: Review job accepted and queued. Returns jobId and status.

403.description: Caller lacks `ClientAdministrator` role for the specified client.

409.description: Active review job already exists for this PR iteration.

get.summary:
Returns a paginated list of stored thread memory embeddings for the given client.
Optionally filters by a search term matched against file path, repository ID, or resolution summary.

403.description: Caller is not an admin.

delete.summary:
Deletes the stored embedding with the given ID (scoped to the owning client).
Also resets `last_seen_status` to null on the corresponding scan thread
so the next crawl cycle will re-evaluate the thread.
Idempotent — returns 204 even if the record does not exist.

403.description: Caller is not an admin.

post.summary:
Dismisses a finding by storing it as an admin-dismissed memory record.
Future reviews will suppress similar findings via the memory reconsideration pipeline.

requestBody.description: Dismiss request with the finding message and optional label.

201.description: Finding dismissed and memory record created.

403.description: Caller is not an admin.

get.summary: Returns a paginated list of memory activity log entries for the given client.

parameters.name: pullRequestId
parameters.description: Optional: filter by pull request ID.

200.description: Paginated list of activity log entries.

403.description: Caller is not an admin.

post.summary: Generates a new PAT for the current user. Returns the plaintext token once.

get.summary: Lists PATs for the current user (hashes are never returned).

post.summary: Changes the current user's password and revokes all refresh tokens.

400.description: The request is invalid or the new password does not meet policy.

401.description: Authentication is missing, invalid, or the current password is incorrect.

ActivateAiConnectionRequest.description: Request body for activating an AI connection with a specific model.

AdoBranchOptionDto.description: A branch option discovered for one source.

AdoCrawlFilterOptionDto.description: A crawl-filter option discovered for one project.

AdoOrganizationVerificationStatus.description: Verification state for one client-scoped Azure DevOps organization scope.

AdoProjectOptionDto.description: A project option discovered for one organization scope.

AdoSourceOptionDto.description: A repository or wiki option discovered for one project.

endpointUrl.description: Azure OpenAI or AI Foundry endpoint URL.

isActive.description: Whether this is the active connection for the client.

activeModel.description: Selected model when active; null otherwise.

AiConnectionDto.description: Data transfer object for an AI connection. The API key is excluded from JSON serialization.

modelName.description: Deployment/model name as configured on the AI connection.

tokenizerName.description: Tokenizer family used to count embedding input tokens.

maxInputTokens.description: Maximum total input tokens allowed per embedding request.

embeddingDimensions.description: Embedding vector width returned by the deployment.

inputCostPer1MUsd.description: Optional USD price per one million prompt/input tokens.

outputCostPer1MUsd.description: Optional USD price per one million completion/output tokens.

AiConnectionModelCapabilityDto.description: Per-deployment embedding capability metadata configured for an AI connection.

AiConnectionModelCapabilityRequest.description: One per-deployment embedding capability payload item for create or update requests.

AiConnectionModelCategory.description:
Model category tag for an `AiConnection`.
Allows clients to configure a dedicated AI endpoint per file complexity tier.
When a connection with a matching category is present, the orchestrator uses it
instead of the default active connection for that tier.

AppUserRole.description: Global role assigned directly to an application user.

CanonicalSourceReferenceDto.description: Transport shape for a provider-aware canonical source reference.

ClientAdoOrganizationScopeDto.description: Client-scoped organization option and verification state used by guided Azure DevOps configuration.

ClientResponse.description: Client response — key, ADO secret, and credential metadata are never included.

ClientRole.description: Role a user holds within a specific client.

ClientTokenUsageSampleDto.description: A single (model, day) token usage data point returned by the token-usage dashboard endpoint.

CommentResolutionBehavior.description: Specifies how the automated reviewer behaves when automatically resolving a comment thread.

CommentSeverity.description: Severity level of a review comment.

ContributingMemorySummaryDto.description: Summary of an external memory record that contributed to a review in this pull request.

CrawlRepoFilterRequest.description: A single repo filter entry in a PATCH request.

CrawlRepoFilterResponse.description: A single repo filter entry in a crawl config response.

CreateAdminCrawlConfigRequest.description: Request body for creating an admin-managed crawl configuration.

CreateAiConnectionRequest.description: Request body for creating a new AI connection.

CreateClientAdoOrganizationScopeRequest.description: Request body for creating a client-scoped Azure DevOps organization scope.

CreateClientRequest.description: Request body for creating a client.

CreatePromptOverrideRequest.description: Request to create a prompt override.

DiscoverModelsRequest.description: Request body for probing an AI endpoint to discover available model deployments.

findingMessage.description: The original finding message to dismiss.

filePath.description: Optional file path to scope the dismissal.

label.description: Optional human-readable label for the dismissal.

DismissFindingRequest.description: Request to dismiss a finding and store it as an admin-dismissed memory record.

id.description: VSS identity GUID — use as `reviewerId` when setting the client reviewer identity.

JobDetailResponse.description: Detailed response for a single job, including the per-tier token breakdown.

JobListItem.description: Single job item in the list response.

JobListResponse.description: Response for the job list endpoint.

MemoryActivityAction.description: Describes the outcome of a single thread-lifecycle state machine evaluation recorded in `memory_activity_log`.

previousStatus.description: The `last_seen_status` value before this crawl cycle. Null for brand-new threads.

currentStatus.description: The ADO thread status observed this crawl cycle.

reason.description:
For no-ops: `already_resolved` or `still_active`.
For admin deletes: `admin_deleted`.
For failures: brief error summary.
Null for successful store/remove actions.

occurredAt.description: UTC timestamp when the state machine evaluated this thread.

MemoryActivityLogEntry.description:
Append-only crawl-side audit record.  One row per state machine evaluation per thread per crawl cycle.
Persisted in the `memory_activity_log` table — never updated or deleted by the system.

MemorySource.description: Discriminator that indicates how a `ThreadMemoryRecord` was created.

PatchAdminCrawlConfigRequest.description:
Request body for patching an admin-managed crawl configuration.
Omit a field to leave it unchanged.

PatchClientAdoOrganizationScopeRequest.description:
Request body for patching a client-scoped Azure DevOps organization scope.
Omit a field to leave it unchanged.

PatchClientRequest.description:
Request body for patching a client. All fields are optional; omitted fields are left unchanged.
Set MeisterProPR.Api.Controllers.PatchClientRequest.CustomSystemMessage to `""` (empty string) to clear an existing value.

PrJobSummaryDto.description: Summary of a single review job within the PR view.

PrReviewViewDto.description: Aggregated view of all review activity for a specific pull request.

ProCursorKnowledgeSourceRequest.description: API request body for creating a ProCursor knowledge source.

ProCursorKnowledgeSourceResponse.description: Response payload for a ProCursor knowledge source.

ProCursorLatestSnapshotResponse.description: Response payload describing the latest snapshot for a ProCursor source.

ProCursorRefreshRequest.description: Request used to enqueue manual indexing or refresh work.

ProCursorRefreshResponse.description: Response payload returned when a refresh job is queued.

ProCursorRefreshTriggerMode.description: Trigger behavior for tracked-branch refresh scheduling.

ProCursorSourceModelUsageDto.description: Model-level breakdown entry for one ProCursor knowledge source.

ProCursorSourceScopeMode.description: Determines which ProCursor sources are available to one crawl configuration.

ProCursorTokenUsageBreakdownItemDto.description: Breakdown item used in time-series and grouped reporting responses.

ProCursorTokenUsageCallType.description: Categorizes one ProCursor-owned AI call for reporting and drill-down views.

ProCursorTokenUsageEventDto.description: One safe ProCursor token usage event returned for recent-events drill-down.

ProCursorTokenUsageEventsResponse.description: Envelope for recent ProCursor usage events for one knowledge source.

ProCursorTokenUsageFreshnessResponse.description: Freshness metadata for the ProCursor usage rollup pipeline.

ProCursorTokenUsageGranularity.description: Supported reporting bucket granularities for ProCursor token usage.

ProCursorTokenUsageRebuildRequest.description: Request payload for rebuilding a selected ProCursor rollup interval.

ProCursorTokenUsageRebuildResponse.description: Response returned after a ProCursor rollup rebuild request is accepted or completed.

ProCursorTokenUsageSeriesPointDto.description: One time bucket returned by a client-wide ProCursor usage query.

ProCursorTokenUsageTotalsDto.description: Totals returned by ProCursor token usage endpoints.

ProCursorTopSourceUsageDto.description: Ranked top source item returned for a client-wide ProCursor usage query.

ProCursorTopSourcesResponse.description: Ranked top-sources response returned for a selected client reporting period.

ProCursorTrackedBranchPatchRequest.description: API request body for patching one tracked branch.

ProCursorTrackedBranchRequest.description: API request body for creating a tracked branch.

ProCursorTrackedBranchResponse.description: Response payload for one tracked branch.

crawlConfigId.description: Owning crawl configuration ID, or null for client-scoped overrides.

promptKey.description: Named prompt segment this override replaces.

PromptOverrideDto.description: Data transfer object for a per-client or per-crawl-config AI prompt override.

occurredAt.description: UTC timestamp when the event occurred.

inputTokens.description: Input tokens for this event, or null.

outputTokens.description: Output tokens for this event, or null.

inputTextSample.description: First 4000 characters of input text, or null.

outputSummary.description: First 1000 characters of output, or null.

error.description: Error message if this event failed, or null.

ProtocolEventDto.description: Carries data for a single event in a review protocol.

ProtocolEventKind.description: Discriminates the kind of event recorded in a MeisterProPR.Domain.Entities.ProtocolEvent.

ReviewCommentDto.description: DTO for a single review comment.

ReviewJobAcceptedResponse.description: Response returned when a review job is accepted or a duplicate is found.

id.description: Unique identifier of the protocol record.

jobId.description: The review job this protocol belongs to.

label.description: Human-readable label for this protocol pass (e.g. file path or "synthesis").

fileResultId.description: The file result this protocol pass belongs to, or null.

completedAt.description: When the agentic loop finished, or null if still in progress.

totalInputTokens.description: Sum of input tokens across all AI calls.

totalOutputTokens.description: Sum of output tokens across all AI calls.

toolCallCount.description: Total tool calls made during the loop.

finalConfidence.description: Final aggregated confidence score (0–100), or null if unavailable.

modelId.description: The AI model deployment name used for this protocol pass. Null for legacy records.

events.description: Ordered list of events captured during the loop.

ReviewJobProtocolDto.description: Carries protocol data for a single review job execution attempt.

ReviewJobResultDto.description: Response for the job result endpoint, combining status metadata with the review result.

ReviewListItem.description: List item for a review job.

ReviewRequest.description: Request payload to submit a pull request for review.

ReviewResultDto.description: DTO representing the textual review result and comments.

ReviewStatusResponse.description: Detailed status response for a review job.

SetAdoCredentialsRequest.description: Request body for setting ADO service principal credentials.

SetReviewerIdentityRequest.description: Request body for setting the ADO reviewer identity on a client.

createdAt.description: When the record was first stored.

updatedAt.description: When the record was last upserted.

ThreadMemoryRecordDto.description: DTO for a stored thread memory embedding (admin view).

ThreadMemorySummaryDto.description: Summary of a thread memory record that originated from this pull request.

modelId.description: The effective AI model deployment name (e.g. "gpt-4o", "gpt-4o-mini").

totalInputTokens.description: Accumulated input tokens for this tier/model combination.

totalOutputTokens.description: Accumulated output tokens for this tier/model combination.

TokenBreakdownEntry.description:
Represents the token cost contribution of a single effort-tier / model-ID combination within a review job.
Stored as a JSONB array in the `review_jobs.token_breakdown` column.

UpdateAiConnectionRequest.description: Request body for updating an AI connection. All fields are optional — omit to leave unchanged.

UpdatePromptOverrideRequest.description: Request to replace the override text of an existing prompt override.
